\tzpentry{ID3401}{Coupled Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3401 introduces Coupled Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \hat{H}_{coupling} = g_{gq}\hat{L}_{gyro} \cdot \hat{\boldsymbol{\mu}}_{quantum} + g_{qp}\hat{\sigma}_{tunnel} \cdot \hat{S}_{photon} + g_{gp}\omega_{gyro}\hat{n}_{helicity} $$
